game_start_scene.title: Living room
game_start_scene.text:
A normal day around 2pm, you are watching TV and scrolling on your phone whilst the snow falls gently outside.
 Your peace is broken by a shy knock on your front door.

main_game_hallway_1.title: Hallway
main_game_hallway_1.text: A tall and slender but cute man stands at your front door behind him, down the path, a car with a dented fender. 'Sorry miss' - foreign, British maybe, 'my car.. I'm not used to such conditions..' he trails off, his clothes are sodden from where he's been standing. 'I've called someone out, but given the weather it could be a while, is there any chance to loiter around your place?' Oh yes, he is going to make your perfect subsmissive slave this weekend

options.text: Invite him in to your kitchen
Leave him out there whilst you change into something... fresher

main_game_hallway_1_hard_option_kitchen_.title: Hallway - Kitchen
main_game_hallway_1_hard_option_kitchen_.text: On the way to the kitchen you see your sleeping pills on the side table, pick them up?

hard_option_kitchen_1.title: Kitchen
hard_option_kitchen_1.text: In the kitchen you offer him a seat and begin to make some tea

forest_02_river.title: The Riverbank
forest_02_river.text: A rushing river blocks your path.

forest_03_river.title: The Riverbank
forest_03_river.text: A rushing river trails along the forest.

forest_04_hovel.title: The Riverbank
forest_04_hovel.text: Just adjacent to the riverbank is a cute hovel with smoke peacefully leaving its chimney.

chamber_dungeon.title: The Dungeon
chamber_dungeon.text: A Large cavernous dungeon stretches out before you. There is no sign of the sphinx or the woods you were previously in

chamber_treasure.title: The Treasure Trove
chamber_treasure.text: A huge glittering treasure trove of jewels and relics awaits.
